1.description: All-in-one balanced filter. The standard recommendation for most players.

2.description: Class filter tuned for Amazon. Shows Amazon-relevant items and crafting bases at higher filter levels.

3.description: Class filter tuned for Assassin. Shows Assassin-relevant items and crafting bases at higher filter levels.

4.description: Class filter tuned for Barbarian. Shows Barbarian-relevant items and crafting bases at higher filter levels.

5.description: Class filter tuned for Druid. Shows Druid-relevant items and crafting bases at higher filter levels.

6.description: Class filter tuned for Necromancer. Shows Necromancer-relevant items and crafting bases at higher filter levels.

7.description: Class filter tuned for Paladin. Shows Paladin-relevant items and crafting bases at higher filter levels.

8.description: Class filter tuned for Sorceress. Shows Sorceress-relevant items and crafting bases at higher filter levels.

9.description: Same as the standard filter, but good crafting bases are not limited in higher filter levels.

10.description: All-in-one filter that always shows Uniques and Set items on filter levels 1–8.

11.description: Shows LLD-relevant items at higher filter levels. Includes LLD jewel point evaluation and LLD tags on valuable Set/Unique items.

12.description: LLD Focused filter with a Hyper visual theme.

13.description: All-in-one filter where Runes Pul (21)+ and GG uniques are renamed to hide their identity.

14.description: All-in-one filter with no item display changes — filtering only, no annotations or re-naming.

15.description: All-in-one filter with a Hyper visual theme.

16.description: All-in-one filter with a TalRasha color theme.

17.description: All-in-one filter without item re-naming (e.g. identified rares and unidentified uniques show their original names).
